title: NME 222 German Release was just today
display_title: NME 222 German Release was just today
wikitext:
[]: NME 2.22 - German Release was just today             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 17, 2010 7:14 am Yeah, I still have no blu-ray drive - movie still looks great. DVD comes in a steelbook - limited to 8000. Inlay with DVD Inlay without DVD - Shogoki about to run :) It also comes with a little booklet. A few pages with lots of info. Animated DVD menu. Chapter selection... ... and the bonus material.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Fri Sep 17, 2010 7:20 am Nice! I really like the cut they chose for the cover, it looks like you got a splendid edition.

[]: It looks all... 3D and stuff.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri Sep 17, 2010 7:51 am Whoa, nice menu! Puts 1.11's to shame.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 17, 2010 11:05 am Looks good! You guys are lucky to get 2.22 within the same year as Japan... I'm assuming there's some translation or legal issues with neither non-Japanese editions of 1.11 and 2.22 having the Script as one of the extras... (Then again, the episode scripts for NGE weren't included on Platinum and I doubt the Death(true)2 and EoE scripts would be included on a U.S. (Renewal) release too...)

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Fri Sep 17, 2010 11:13 am Damn slick, simple and decent, especially with the menu system. :) Although there maybe some BD drives out there, the PS3 is still the go-to when it comes to a decent BD player.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Sep 17, 2010 11:15 am Much as 2.22 sucks, it'd be interesting to see some HQ scans of those character sheets, if only as a clue as to what the creators were thinking. I'm also wondering how they managed to write a whole paragraph about the barely-seen Hikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Sep 17, 2010 11:21 am I hate the boxart! I hate it, I hate it, I hate the boxart! They could have done a better job with it!

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Sep 17, 2010 11:51 am It looks like a steel book case but I assume it's not. The Bluray of the second GitS movie was a steel case.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:23 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Looks good! You guys are lucky to get 2.22 within the same year as Japan... I'm assuming there's some translation or legal issues with neither non-Japanese editions of 1.11 and 2.22 having the Script as one of the extras... (Then again, the episode scripts for NGE weren't included on Platinum and I doubt the Death(true)2 and EoE scripts would be included on a U.S. (Renewal) release too...)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:27 pm Does the German release have a German dub?

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:30 pm It does. And I pretty much like it. Maris voice is great They also pronouce the name better than in the german dub of NGE. Finally they say Asga instead of ASUHKAA :P

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:33 pm This boggles my mind. How could they possibly license, translate, dub, and distribute in less than 5 months? I could see if they hadn't dubbed it... but they did. That's crazy!

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:36 pm As far as i know they licensed it already last year. The DVD/BD was also already supposed to be released 3 months ago, but there were some issues with the rental rights. Evangelion 1.01 was also released in October 2008 here in germany. Funimation is just way to slow :P

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 17, 2010 12:46 pm qu4d wrote: Funimation is just way to slow :P

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Sep 17, 2010 1:04 pm Hmm. That´s possible. Yeah, the anime market is pretty small here but we had a pretty limited release of 2.22 in cinemas. It was at least shown on some festivals here a few months ago.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 17, 2010 1:14 pm qu4d wrote: It was at least shown on some festivals here a few months ago.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Sep 17, 2010 2:05 pm yeah, for once it's not that bad to live here. at last i could watch it now. the last fight really blew my mind. i am glad i've waited for the blue Rei release. what a ride i still have a bit of an adrenaline rush =D don't like the cover though. i think the 1.11 looks better. haven't peeked into the extras yet. going to watch it the weekend again.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Fri Sep 17, 2010 2:23 pm looks great, especially that booklet, definitely has more information in it then that little one I got with my 1.11... damn the Germans get way better stuff a lot quicker than we do in the states wish Funi would release more info.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Fri Sep 17, 2010 2:48 pm The big question is can they understand wtf Kaji is saying on their version? of course there is also much jealousy at the nice steelbook releases they have (I like that type of case for some dvd's & games, sue me)

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Sep 17, 2010 3:09 pm i haven't watched the dub yet but i just looked up and when Kaji speaks english, he speaks english in the german dub too. (sups are inclusive of course)
